recommendations.title: Blood Ties
recommendations.overview: Two brothers, on either side of the law, face off over organized crime in Brooklyn during the 1970s.

recommendations.title: Little White Lies 2
recommendations.overview: The sequel to Little White Lies ("Les petits mouchoirs"), set 7 years later. The group of friends, which had separated, reunites for the surprise birthday party organized for Max.

recommendations.title: Little White Lies
recommendations.overview: Despite a traumatic event, a group of friends decide to go ahead with their annual beach vacation. Their relationships, convictions, sense of guilt and friendship are sorely tested. They are finally forced to own up to the little white lies they've b

recommendations.title: Rock'n Roll
recommendations.overview: Guillaume Canet is told by a young co-star that he's no longer Rock'n' Roll and can't sell films anymore. He then tries to prove her wrong and gets help from his girlfriend, Marion Cotillard.

recommendations.title: Asterix & Obelix: The Middle Kingdom
recommendations.overview: Gallic heroes and forever friends Asterix and Obelix journey to China to help Princess Sa See save the Empress and her land from a nefarious prince.

recommendations.title: La Belle Époque
recommendations.overview: Victor, a disillusioned 60-something whose marriage is on the rocks, opts to relive the week of his life when, 40 years earlier, he met his true love through a company that allows customers to return to the time period of their choosing.

recommendations.title: Nocturnal Animals
recommendations.overview: Susan Morrow receives a book manuscript from her ex-husband – a man she left 20 years earlier – asking for her opinion of his writing. As she reads, she is drawn into the fictional life of Tony Hastings, a mathematics professor whose family vacation

recommendations.title: A Walk Among the Tombstones
recommendations.overview: Private investigator Matthew Scudder is hired by a drug kingpin to find out who kidnapped and murdered his wife.

recommendations.title: Andhadhun
recommendations.overview: A series of mysterious events changes the life of a blind pianist who now must report a crime that was actually never witnessed by him.

recommendations.title: Drishyam
recommendations.overview: A simple street-smart man tries to protect his family from a cop looking for her missing son who was accidently killed by his daughter.
